description: **Fix.** `generate`, `build`, and `check --tag build` now write the resolved PG version back to the schema, ensuring version-gated validation and DDL generation use the config-level `pg_version` consistently.

**New feature.** PG capability registry (`internal/pgcap`) provides declarative version-to-feature mapping. All inline PG version comparisons replaced with `pgcap.Has()` calls for 10 capabilities (PG 10-18).
